title: M.Tech in Computer Science Engineering- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
content: The Master of Technology in CSE-AIML at the School of Computer Science & Engineering is a two-year, full-time, postgraduate program designed to equip students with in-depth knowledge and practical expertise in the rapidly evolving domain of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. This learner-centric, industry-oriented, and research-driven program challenges the intellect of students while providing a strong foundation in core computer science principles and specialized knowledge in AI/ML. The curriculum blends core courses, advanced electives, and a substantial dissertation or project, allowing students to gain hands-on experience and engage in cutting-edge research. It prepares postgraduates for diverse career paths—ranging from advanced industry roles in AI-driven technologies to research and innovation in academia or R&D labs. With focused exposure to areas such as deep learning, natural language processing, computer vision, data science, and intelligent systems, this program is an excellent choice for engineering graduates aiming to upskill and lead in the era of intelligent technologies. B.E/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks or equivalent in CGPA Students with a CUET / GATE score will be given preference in the merit list. 01 02 An ability to write and present a substantial technical report/document. 03 01 02 03 01 Have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02
